scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kapter/contracts build && pnpm --filter backend-api build && pnpm --filter dashboard build && pnpm --filter client-web build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter backend-api lint && pnpm --filter mobile-app lint && pnpm --filter dashboard lint && pnpm --filter client-web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @kapter/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter mobile-app exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false && pnpm --filter dashboard typecheck && pnpm --filter client-web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter backend-api exec jest --runInBand && pnpm --filter client-web test
scripts.validate: pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
